entities.name: inbox_analyzer.py
entities.context: Script that scans Inbox/ files, extracts metadata, generates previews, and calls LLM to determine routing actions based on confidence levels

entities.name: inbox_router.py
entities.context: Script that reads analysis log and routes high-confidence (≥85%) files to validated destinations

entities.name: inbox_review_generator.py
entities.context: Script for generating inbox reviews, supports dry-run mode

entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Language model called by inbox_analyzer to determine routing decisions

entities.name: Confidence Threshold System
entities.context: Framework with three tiers: ≥85% auto-route, 60-84% suggest, <60% manual only

entities.name: Inbox Workflow
entities.context: Multi-step process: analyze files, route high-confidence, review remainder

entities.name: Dry-run Mode
entities.context: Safe preview capability available across all inbox scripts

entities.name: Auto-route
entities.context: Automatic file routing action triggered when confidence ≥85%

relationships.context: Calls LLM with analysis prompt to determine routing action
Applies confidence thresholds to categorize routing actions
Reads analysis log generated by inbox_analyzer
Step 1 of the workflow - analyze files
Step 2 of the workflow - route high-confidence files
Auto-route is the action taken when confidence reaches ≥85%
